# Karma

> Ecosystems use Karma to fund projects transparently. Builders use it to share progress, earn reputation, and get discovered.

Karma is a platform where ecosystems allocate funding, track milestones, and measure impact, while builders share progress, earn reputation, and get discovered for more opportunities. Karma supports Optimism, Arbitrum One, Polygon, Base, Celo, Scroll, Lisk, Sei.

## Landing Pages
- [Home](https://www.karmahq.xyz/): Ecosystems use Karma to fund projects transparently. Builders use it to share progress, earn reputation, and get discovered.
- [For Funders](https://www.karmahq.xyz/funders): From intake to impact, Karma gives funders the tools to allocate grants, track milestones, measure outcomes, and grow their ecosystems.
- [Projects](https://www.karmahq.xyz/projects): Discover projects with verified milestones and onchain reputation. Evaluate track records and traction.
- [Communities](https://www.karmahq.xyz/communities): Explore DAOs, protocols, and organizations running funding programs on Karma.
- [Funding Map](https://www.karmahq.xyz/funding-map): Browse open funding programs across ecosystems
- [Knowledge Base](https://www.karmahq.xyz/knowledge): Articles on grant accountability, reputation, and impact measurement

## Developer Docs
- [API Documentation](https://gapapi.karmahq.xyz/v2/docs): REST API docs for projects, communities, grants, and attestations
- [OpenAPI JSON](https://www.karmahq.xyz/openapi.json)

## Documentation
- [Why Karma](https://docs.gap.karmahq.xyz): Overview — Why Karma
- [How does it work?](https://docs.gap.karmahq.xyz/overview/how-does-it-work): Overview — Copy On this page How does it work? High level overview of Karma system Structure of a project on Karma Project Every team (or individual) has a project profile in Karma.
- [Supported Networks](https://docs.gap.karmahq.xyz/overview/supported-networks): Overview — Copy On this page Supported Networks Karma is currently deployed on Optimism , Arbitrum , Celo , Scroll and Lisk networks.
- [For Builders](https://docs.gap.karmahq.xyz/how-to-guides/for-builders): For Builders — Copy On this page Build Your Reputation and Showcase Your Work with Karma Karma with Grantee Accountability Protocol is here to empower you as a grantee and streamline the grant reporting process.
- [Add Grant to Project](https://docs.gap.karmahq.xyz/how-to-guides/for-builders/add-grant-to-project): For Builders — Copy On this page Add Grant to Project Once you've created your project, you can now add a grant you've received.
- [Add Milestone](https://docs.gap.karmahq.xyz/how-to-guides/for-builders/add-milestone): For Builders — Copy On this page Add Milestone This is where you create milestones explaining everything you plan to accomplish through this grant.
- [Add Team members](https://docs.gap.karmahq.xyz/how-to-guides/for-builders/add-team-members): For Builders — Adding Team Members & Setting Admin Permissions This page explains how project owners can add team members to their Karma project and grant admin privileges that allow those members to manage the profile and post updates.
- [Create Project](https://docs.gap.karmahq.xyz/how-to-guides/for-builders/create-project): For Builders — Copy On this page Create your Karma project profile Creating a project is the first big step and you have to do this only once.
- [Login with Safe](https://docs.gap.karmahq.xyz/how-to-guides/for-builders/login-with-safe): For Builders — Copy On this page Login with Safe Karma supports logging in with Safe wallet. Follow the instructions in the video below to login with Safe.
- [Merge projects](https://docs.gap.karmahq.xyz/how-to-guides/for-builders/merge-projects): For Builders — Merge projects
- [Post grant update](https://docs.gap.karmahq.xyz/how-to-guides/for-builders/post-grant-update): For Builders — Copy On this page Post grant update Occasionally, it's beneficial to keep the grant manager and community informed between milestones.
- [Post Milestone update](https://docs.gap.karmahq.xyz/how-to-guides/for-builders/post-milestone-update): For Builders — Copy On this page Post Milestone update When you complete a milestone, you can post an update on that milestone!
- [Transfer Ownership](https://docs.gap.karmahq.xyz/how-to-guides/for-builders/transfer-ownership): For Builders — Copy On this page Transfer Ownership How to Manage Project Ownership in Karma Projects in Karma are owned by an Ethereum wallet account.
- [For Grant Managers](https://docs.gap.karmahq.xyz/how-to-guides/for-grant-managers): For Grant Managers — Copy On this page For Grant Managers What is the Grant Manager's role in Karma?
- [Categorize grants](https://docs.gap.karmahq.xyz/how-to-guides/for-grant-managers/categorize-grants): For Grant Managers — Copy On this page Categorize grants Grant managers can categorize various grants issued in their community.
- [Grant review](https://docs.gap.karmahq.xyz/how-to-guides/for-grant-managers/grant-review): For Grant Managers — Copy On this page Grant review Karma has the review feature that can be utilized by grant managers to review grants.
- [Impact Measurement](https://docs.gap.karmahq.xyz/how-to-guides/for-grant-managers/impact-measurement): For Grant Managers — Copy On this page Impact Measurement Karma’s impact measurement system helps program operators define, collect, and analyze the outputs and outcomes of funded projects using standardized and custom indicators.
- [Verify grant update](https://docs.gap.karmahq.xyz/how-to-guides/for-grant-managers/verify-grant-update): For Grant Managers — Copy On this page Verify grant update As grant manager, you can verify a milestone or grant update posted by grantee.
- [For Reviewers](https://docs.gap.karmahq.xyz/how-to-guides/for-reviewers): For Reviewers — For Reviewers
- [Application Review Guide](https://docs.gap.karmahq.xyz/how-to-guides/for-reviewers/application-review-guide): For Reviewers — Copy On this page Application Review Guide Application reviewers are responsible for evaluating incoming grant applications and making approve/reject decisions.
- [For Community Members](https://docs.gap.karmahq.xyz/how-to-guides/for-community-members): For Community Members — Copy On this page For Community Members How can you participate in Karma? Endorse projects: If you believe in a project and its potential impact, you can endorse it on Karma.
- [Endorse project](https://docs.gap.karmahq.xyz/how-to-guides/for-community-members/endorse-project): For Community Members — Copy On this page Endorse project Endorsing a project means publicly expressing your support for it.
- [Verify grant update](https://docs.gap.karmahq.xyz/how-to-guides/for-community-members/verify-grant-update): For Community Members — Copy On this page Verify grant update Community members can verify grant updates too. Follow the steps here to verify grant update.
- [Verify Impact](https://docs.gap.karmahq.xyz/how-to-guides/for-community-members/verify-impact): For Community Members — Copy On this page Verify Impact Grantees have the ability to document the impact they have created by creating impact attestations onchain.
- [Developers](https://docs.gap.karmahq.xyz/how-to-guides/developers): Developers — Copy On this page Developers If you are a developer interested in integration of Karma into your application, you can find the APIs docs below: API DOCS (v2) Contact our tech team on Telegram if you have any questions.
- [FAQs](https://docs.gap.karmahq.xyz/how-to-guides/faqs): FAQs — Copy On this page What is the difference between a Project and a Grant in Karma? Project: This is a profile for your overall work or initiative.
- [Partners](https://docs.gap.karmahq.xyz/how-to-guides/partners): Partners — Copy On this page Partners Karma has been integrated into following platforms: Octant - Milestones and updates posted by Octant grantees in Karma are displayed in Octant's platform.
- [Celo - Proof of Ship](https://docs.gap.karmahq.xyz/how-to-guides/partners/celo-proof-of-ship): Partners — Copy On this page Celo - Proof of Ship Instructions for submitting your project for Celo - Proof of Ship program Proof-of-Ship is a monthly contest that rewards builders for actively building on Celo.
- [CeloPG - Proof of Impact](https://docs.gap.karmahq.xyz/how-to-guides/partners/celopg-proof-of-impact): Partners — CeloPG - Proof of Impact
- [Filecoin](https://docs.gap.karmahq.xyz/how-to-guides/partners/filecoin): Partners — Filecoin
- [Milestone Reviewer Guide](https://docs.gap.karmahq.xyz/how-to-guides/partners/filecoin/milestone-reviewer-guide): Partners — Copy On this page Milestone Reviewer Guide Milestone reviewers are responsible for verifying that grantees have completed the milestones defined in their approved grants.
- [ProPGF Batch 1 Grantee Guide](https://docs.gap.karmahq.xyz/how-to-guides/partners/filecoin/propgf-batch-1-grantee-guide): Partners — Copy On this page ProPGF Batch 1 Grantee Guide Filecoin ProPGF Grantee Guide Welcome to Karma! Filecoin has partnered with Karma to manage ProPGF grants going forward.
- [ProPGF Grantee Guide](https://docs.gap.karmahq.xyz/how-to-guides/partners/filecoin/propgf-grantee-guide): Partners — Copy On this page ProPGF Grantee Guide Filecoin ProPGF Grantee Guide Welcome!
- [Gitcoin](https://docs.gap.karmahq.xyz/how-to-guides/partners/gitcoin): Partners — Copy On this page Gitcoin Gitcoin has integrated Karma into their application. Project milestones added in Karma will now be automatically displayed on the corresponding project pages in Gitcoin.
- [Global Stablecoin Hackathon](https://docs.gap.karmahq.xyz/how-to-guides/partners/global-stablecoin-hackathon): Partners — Global Stablecoin Hackathon
- [Octant](https://docs.gap.karmahq.xyz/how-to-guides/partners/octant): Partners — Copy On this page Octant Octant has integrated Karma into their application. Project milestones added in Karma will now be automatically displayed on the corresponding project pages in Octant.
- [UNICEF](https://docs.gap.karmahq.xyz/how-to-guides/partners/unicef): Partners — Copy On this page UNICEF The UNICEF Venture Fund provides funding to projects on a biannual basis.

## Site URL Index

## Optional
- [Complete LLM Reference](https://www.karmahq.xyz/llms-full.txt): Full inline content for all pages and articles
- [Grant Milestones vs Impact](https://www.karmahq.xyz/knowledge/milestones-vs-impact): Core Concepts — Milestones track work done while impact tracks change created. Learn why separating these concepts is critical for honest evaluation of funded projects.
- [How DAOs Track Grant Milestones](https://www.karmahq.xyz/knowledge/dao-grant-milestones): Core Concepts — Explore how DAOs define, track, and evaluate grant milestones. Compare approaches from spreadsheets to modular platforms and learn the tradeoffs of each method.
- [How to Verify Impact Without Centralized Auditors](https://www.karmahq.xyz/knowledge/impact-verification): Core Concepts — Learn how impact can be verified through transparent documentation, peer review, and public evidence instead of relying solely on centralized audits.
- [Manual vs Platform-Based Grant Tracking](https://www.karmahq.xyz/knowledge/manual-vs-platform-grant-tracking): Core Concepts — Compare spreadsheets and documents with dedicated funding platforms for grant tracking. Learn when manual tools break down and when structured platforms scale better.
- [The Grant Lifecycle: From Proposal to Verified Impact](https://www.karmahq.xyz/knowledge/grant-lifecycle): Core Concepts — Follow the complete grant process from proposal submission to verified impact. Learn the 10 stages every funding program needs to track and coordinate.
- [What Is Grant Accountability in Open Funding?](https://www.karmahq.xyz/knowledge/grant-accountability): Core Concepts — Grant accountability turns funding promises into persistent execution history. Discover how to track funded projects and improve capital allocation over time.
- [Why Most Grant Programs Fail After Funding](https://www.karmahq.xyz/knowledge/why-grant-programs-fail): Core Concepts — Grant programs fail at post-funding follow-through, not project selection. Learn the structural reasons and how to build systems that learn from outcomes.
- [AI-Assisted Grant Evaluation at Scale](https://www.karmahq.xyz/knowledge/ai-grant-evaluation): Capabilities — Learn how AI-assisted evaluation helps grant programs process hundreds of applications without sacrificing review quality. Explore practical approaches to scaling.
- [Document Signing in Grant Programs](https://www.karmahq.xyz/knowledge/grant-document-signing): Capabilities — Understand why grant agreements must be tracked as part of the funding workflow. Learn how integrated document signing prevents operational chaos and payment delays.
- [Grant Fund Disbursement Coordination](https://www.karmahq.xyz/knowledge/grant-fund-disbursement): Capabilities — Learn how grant payments are safely triggered once KYC, signing, and approvals are complete. Explore best practices for coordinating fund disbursement at scale.
- [Impact Measurement for Funded Projects](https://www.karmahq.xyz/knowledge/impact-measurement): Capabilities — Discover how funded work connects to verifiable outputs and outcomes. Learn practical approaches to measuring impact and improving capital allocation decisions.
- [KYC in Grant and Funding Programs](https://www.karmahq.xyz/knowledge/grant-kyc): Capabilities — Learn how identity verification integrates into grant workflows without slowing down funding. Explore KYC best practices for compliance and operational efficiency.
- [Ethereum Attestation Service](https://attest.org)
